title: たとえば、カラフルメモリー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the mood for a good flick on one of my days off. Little do I
expect to see Mejiro Dober in the lobby.
choice_data_list: Hey, Dober! Quite the coincidence!
Hi, Dober! Quite the coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eh? You've got the wrong person!
choice_data_list: Wait, Dober! It's me!
Wait, Dober! It's me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you. Don't just shout out from behind someone! Of course
I was surprised!
choice_data_list: Did you have to run away, though?
Did you have to run away, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... You really surprised me, calling out suddenly from
behind me like that.
choice_data_list: Did you have to run away, though?
Did you have to run away, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, that's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, that's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I can tell you since you went ahead and looked that one
time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, I suppose you already know after seeing my illustrations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was thinking of seeing this today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was thinking of seeing this today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober reaches for her smartphone and pulls up a ticket she
had reserved online.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a ticket for the film "Veggie Caroline: Veggin' Out on Summer
Vacation!" It's the latest entry in the kids' anime series she was
drawing characters of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was actually supposed to watch it with Ryan, but something came up
with her, so now I'm here alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And there are a lot more children here than I imagined... I'll probably
stand out quite a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami was telling me that the new "Pretty Fighters" movie was
about half adults and half kids, so I thought this might be similar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any other academy students either, so I feel like I'll
definitely be standing out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should just wait until Ryan is free again...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm, but the limited-edition entry bonuses are sure to run out before
then. I probably can't afford to wait.
choice_data_list: Wanna watch it together with me, then?
Would you like to watch it with me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You had to have come here because there's something you
wanted to see. I'm positively sure that it wasn't Veggie Caroline.
choice_data_list:
I'm interested in knowing more about what you
want to see!

I'm interested in knowing more about what you
want to see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You had to have come here because there's something you
wanted to see. Don't feel like you need to force yourself for my sake.
choice_data_list:
I'm interested in knowing more about what you
want to see!

I'm interested in knowing more about what you
want to see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Really now... Well, don't blame me if you're bored to death or
something. Have it your way.
choice_data_list: All right!
Of course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Well, if you're okay with it, then by all means, I'd like to
have you see it with me.
choice_data_list: All right!
Of course!

text_block_list.name: Theater Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Seating has begun at screen 2 for "Veggie Caroline: Veggin' Out on
Summer Vacation!"

text_block_list.name: Theater Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Seating has begun at screen 2 for "Veggie Caroline: Veggin' Out on
Summer Vacation!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, that's us... Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, that's us... Let's go, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone receives a special sticker sheet as they enter the theater.
My white sheet is lined with various holographic stickers featuring
movie characters.
choice_data_list: Would you like my stickers?
Would you like my stickers?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone receives a special sticker sheet as they enter the theater.
My white sheet is lined with various holographic stickers featuring
movie characters.
choice_data_list: Would you like my stickers?
Would you like my stickers?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is that okay? Th-thanks. I was actually thinking that I might have to
see the movie again to get another sheet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is that okay? To be honest, I was wanting to get two sheets, and I
would have had to see the movie again. This really helps. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Your stickers are white. Too bad it's still not my preferred color.
choice_data_list: Aren't the stickers the same on all the sheets?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Your stickers are white. Too bad it's still not my preferred color.
choice_data_list: Aren't the stickers the same on all the sheets?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stickers are not arranged randomly on the sheets. The only
difference is the background color.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That may be so, but it's exactly because of that it would be nice to
get your favorite color.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I bet that little kids can get really upset about it. In fact, I heard some
parents talking about it.
choice_data_list: How about when you were little?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I didn't... really do that. Ryan was always there to smooth things over
or get me the color I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I didn't really, no. Ryan would always arrange to get us younger kids
the colors we wanted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, this conversation is kind of silly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, this conversation is kind of silly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Maybe I can ask the staff if I can exchange them for some green ones.

text_block_list.name: Theater Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but we're unable to allow color choice or exchange of the
stickers. We ask for your understanding.

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
The nice lady says we can't change them. Let's go with this color,
okay? Look, it even has Caroline!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I don't want green!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like this little girl's stickers are green. I can't help but notice
that the red outfit she is wearing is rather close to Caroline's in the
movie.
choice_data_list: What color did you get, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? They're red.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you can exchange stickers with her
then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hers are green all right. But how can you be so sure that she'd
want red?
choice_data_list: I have a feeling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A skeptical Mejiro Dober and I approach the parent and child.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A skeptical Mejiro Dober and I approach the parent and child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That worked out well... How on earth did you know that she wanted
red?
choice_data_list: She was wearing red overalls.
She was wearing red overalls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That worked out well... Trainer, how did you know that she wanted
red stickers?
choice_data_list: She was wearing red overalls.
She was wearing red overalls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that since Caroline also wears red overalls, she may have
been trying to imitate her favorite character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that since Caroline also wears red overalls, she may have
been trying to imitate her favorite character.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well I guess that should be expected of a trainer. It's kind of
your job to be observant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Observation skills to be expected of a pro trainer I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That kid probably thinks you're a big fan of Veggie Caroline now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That kid probably thinks you're a big fan of Veggie Caroline now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I think you managed to stand out even more than me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I think you managed to stand out even more than me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The movie turned out to be much more interesting than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was pretty surprised to see them give so much screen time to some
of the more obscure characters. The little ones at home must have
been talking about them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You know... I have a much younger sister and brother.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They both seem to really love Veggie Caroline. I wanted to know
more about what they were talking about, so that's why I wanted to
come see it.
choice_data_list: These stickers are for them, aren't they?
These stickers are for them, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm glad I was able to get their favorite colors. If it were just me,
there would have been no way I could approach anyone else to
exchange them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So thanks... for watching the movie with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Watching the movie with me was a big help, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was able to relax and not worry about any eyes that would be on
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was able to relax and not worry about any eyes that would be on
me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It was kind of reassuring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Having you there next to me was rather reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So that's the long and short of it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, Mejiro Dober picks up her pace and walks out ahead of
me, her hair glistening and swaying in the twilight glow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, Mejiro Dober turns her eyes shyly away from mine. Her
profile glows a faint crimson in the twilight gleam.
